title: Income
description: How to complete income sections of your tax return using myTax.

child_links.title: Salary, wages, allowances, tips, bonuses etc. (including lump sums)
child_links.description: How to report salary, wages, ETPs, Government payments or First home super saver income in myTax.

child_links.title: Australian super or annuity payments
child_links.description: How to complete myTax if you have annuities, super income streams or super lump sums.

child_links.title: Australian income or losses from investments or property
child_links.description: How to complete myTax for interest, dividends, managed fund distributions, capital gains or rent.

child_links.title: Sole trader and business income or losses and partnership or trust distributions
child_links.description: How to complete myTax for business/sole trader, partnership, trust or personal services income.

child_links.title: Foreign income
child_links.description: How to report foreign employment, pensions, annuities or other foreign income in myTax.

child_links.title: Other income
child_links.description: How to complete myTax if you have other income, including employee share schemes.

child_links.title: Amounts that you do not pay tax on
child_links.description: Information for myTax about amounts that you do not pay tax on.
